name_en: Premium Original Leather M23950 Black Mini. This Capucines Mini Handbag features the exquisite Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather constructs the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant aura. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm
